basic_details.organization_name: Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER)
basic_details.short_information: Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 2 Senior Residents Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for healthcare jobs. Candidates with Medical qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part-II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, registered with Central State medical council, Postgraduate degree MD (Nuclear Medicine) or equivalent. Only Indian Nationals. qualification can directly attend the interview on 9 July 2026.

age_limit.age_details: 45 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC candidates)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree MD (Nuclear Medicine) or equivalent
qualification.details: A medical qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part-II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. Must be registered with the Central State medical council. A postgraduate degree MD (Nuclear Medicine) in the speciality concerned or its equivalent. Only Indian National candidates are allowed to apply.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Residents Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the PGIMER Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download PGIMER Senior Residents Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
PGIMER Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A medical qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part-II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. Must be registered with the Central State medical council. A postgraduate degree MD (Nuclear Medicine) in the speciality concerned or its equivalent. Only Indian National candidates are allowed to apply.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
PGIMER Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for PGIMER Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Senior Residents recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in interview. Candidates need to report for the interview on 9th July 2026. Ensure you reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Residents at PGIMER?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Senior Residents post in the Nuclear Medicine Department at PGIMER, Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Residents post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a medical qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part-II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, and a postgraduate degree MD (Nuclear Medicine) or its equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Senior Residents position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST (5 years) and OBC (3 years) candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Residents post?
faq.answer: The salary details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific salary information.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Interested and eligible candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for PGIMER Senior Residents recruitment scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held at PGIMER, Chandigarh. The exact venue and time will be detailed in the official notification, but candidates should be prepared to report on 9th July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs. This includes educational certificates, registration certificates, and ID proof.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Senior Residents position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Senior Residents post is on a Contract basis.
